arts.ttl: Preview: Heerenveen vs. AZ Alkmaar - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between Heerenveen and AZ Alkmaar, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
